name: Declarative-static
summary: Parse-once DOM + bind-* + {{ }} text + <template is> directives. The native-first default; mount-once (no update()).

name: Virtual DOM
summary: A render() returns a tree; diff + patch on change. Iteration/conditionals are plain JS (.map(), &&).

name: Fine-grained
summary: Expressions become reactive computations tracked at read-time; surgical DOM updates, no diff.

name: Imperative
summary: Direct, hand-written createElement manipulation. The escape hatch when no declarative form fits.
